howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Create your perfect costume portrait in four simple steps

step1.title: Upload Your Selfie
step1.description: Take or upload a photo. Optional but recommended for personalized results.

step2.title: Describe Your Costume
step2.description: Any character you can imagine - from vampires to superheroes to fantasy creatures.

step3.title: Get Your Portrait
step3.description: Download and share your AI-generated portrait in seconds.

step4.title: Create Group Selfies
step4.description: Combine two costume portraits into spooky group selfies in haunted settings.

q1.question: Do I need to upload a selfie?
q1.answer: No, but it helps create a portrait that looks like you. You can also generate without one for generic costume ideas.

q2.question: How much candy does it cost?
q2.answer: 5 pieces of candy per portrait generation. You get free candy when you sign up to get started.

q3.question: What makes a good costume description?
q3.answer: Be specific! Instead of 'vampire,' try 'elegant Victorian vampire with red eyes.' The more details, the better the result.

q4.question: Can I download and share my portraits?
q4.answer: Absolutely! All generated portraits are yours to download, share on social media, and use however you like.

q5.question: How long does generation take?
q5.answer: Most portraits are ready in 30-60 seconds. We'll show you a loading animation while the AI works its magic.

q6.question: What if I don't like my result?
q6.answer: Try adjusting your description or uploading a different photo. You can generate as many variations as you want.

q7.question: Is my photo data secure?
q7.answer: Yes! We use enterprise-grade security. Your photos are processed securely and stored with encryption.

q8.question: Can I use these commercially?
q8.answer: Generated portraits are for personal use. Contact us for commercial licensing options.
